title: Joyride, Feastables, and Prime Hydration
description: You can eat Mrbeast Feastables, Ryan Trahan's Candy, and Prime hydration from Logan Paul and KSI.
body:
Have you ever wanted to eat YouTuber candy in Minecraft?
Well now you can.

These are the retextured items below.

  -MrBeast Feastables is retextured raw chicken.

  -Prime Hydration is retextured honey bottle.

  -Joyride is retextured raw mutton.

All the youtuber candy is just retextured, and does not change the vanilla experience.

This Texture Pack should work for most newer versions of Minecraft such as 1.21, 1.20, 1.19, and 1.18
